# StrengthInsight

> StrengthInsight helps WHOOP and Hevy users track lift progression from screenshots. Upload a session screenshot — AI extracts your sets, reps, and weights — and get progression charts, PR tracking, plateau detection, and AI-generated next workouts.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://strengthinsight.app/
- Blog: https://strengthinsight.app/blog/

## Blog Posts

- https://strengthinsight.app/blog/whoop-strength-trainer-progression/
- https://strengthinsight.app/blog/can-i-access-whoop-strength-trainer-data/
- https://strengthinsight.app/blog/best-fitness-trackers-for-sleep-and-recovery/

## What StrengthInsight Does

- Extracts workout data (exercises, sets, reps, weights) from WHOOP Strength Trainer and Hevy screenshots using AI
- Builds per-exercise progression charts and estimated 1RM trends
- Tracks personal records and detects plateaus
- Correlates WHOOP recovery scores with lifting performance
- Generates AI-powered next workout recommendations based on training history

## What StrengthInsight Does Not Do

- Does not require WHOOP API access
- Does not replace the WHOOP app
- Does not expose user data to third parties
